requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS in Cambodia
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——柬埔寨无欧盟式横向 RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——柬埔寨無歐盟式橫向 RoHS

summary.en: Cambodia does not currently operate an EU-style horizontal hazardous-substance restriction regime equivalent to RoHS (Directive 2011/65/EU) for electrical and electronic equipment. There is no Cambodian general legal requirement that LED luminaires comply with a fixed list of restricted substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates added by EU RoHS) with a CE-style declaration. Substance content is therefore governed by any specific CS / IEC product standard that happens to set limits (for example mercury content limits inherent to certain lamp standards), by buyer or sectoral specifications, and by general product-safety and import expectations under ISC, rather than by a dedicated Cambodian RoHS law. This should be stated plainly: the absence of a horizontal RoHS regime means there is no standalone Cambodian RoHS conformity step.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨目前未实行相当于 RoHS（指令 2011/65/EU）的欧盟式横向有害物质限制制度以管理电气电子设备。柬埔寨没有要求 LED 灯具符合固定受限物质清单（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及欧盟 RoHS 新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯）并作 CE 式声明的普遍法律要求。因此物质含量由恰好设定限值的特定 CS / IEC 产品标准（例如某些灯标准固有的汞含量限值）、买方或行业规范，以及 ISC 下的一般产品安全与进口预期管理，而非由专门的柬埔寨 RoHS 法律管理。应据实说明：缺乏横向 RoHS 制度意味着不存在独立的柬埔寨 RoHS 合格评定步骤。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨目前未實行相當於 RoHS（指令 2011/65/EU）的歐盟式橫向有害物質限制制度以管理電氣電子設備。柬埔寨沒有要求 LED 燈具符合固定受限物質清單（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及歐盟 RoHS 新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯）並作 CE 式聲明的普遍法律要求。因此物質含量由恰好設定限值的特定 CS / IEC 產品標準（例如某些燈標準固有的汞含量限值）、買方或行業規範，以及 ISC 下的一般產品安全與進口預期管理，而非由專門的柬埔寨 RoHS 法律管理。應據實說明：缺乏橫向 RoHS 制度意味著不存在獨立的柬埔寨 RoHS 合格評定步驟。

standards_or_laws: No EU-style horizontal RoHS regime in Cambodia for EEE (no Cambodian equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU)
Substance limits, where they exist, arise from specific CS / IEC product standards or buyer specifications rather than a dedicated Cambodian RoHS law

summary.en: China operates its own restriction regime: GB/T 26572 (limit requirements for restricted substances in EEE) and the China RoHS 2 administrative measures, with marking (the orange Environmental Protection Use Period logo and a hazardous-substance table) and, for catalogue products, conformity requirements. China RoHS restricts lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB and PBDE, but does not include the four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) added by EU RoHS. A Chinese manufacturer typically already holds a hazardous-substance declaration and GB/T 26572 test data, which is useful evidence even though Cambodia imposes no matching legal RoHS obligation.
summary.zh: 中国实行自身限制制度：GB/T 26572（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求）及中国 RoHS 2 管理办法，含标识（橙色环保使用期限标志及有害物质表），对目录产品另有合格评定要求。中国 RoHS 限制铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB 及 PBDE，但不含欧盟 RoHS 新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）。中国制造商通常已持有有害物质声明及 GB/T 26572 检测数据，即便柬埔寨未施加对应法律 RoHS 义务，这仍是有用证据。
summary.zht: 中國實行自身限制制度：GB/T 26572（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求）及中國 RoHS 2 管理辦法，含標識（橙色環保使用期限標誌及有害物質表），對目錄產品另有合格評定要求。中國 RoHS 限制鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB 及 PBDE，但不含歐盟 RoHS 新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）。中國製造商通常已持有有害物質聲明及 GB/T 26572 檢測數據，即便柬埔寨未施加對應法律 RoHS 義務，這仍是有用證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Requirements of concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (China RoHS)
China RoHS 2 administrative measures — marking and conformity (catalogue-based)

gap.en: This is a case where the China baseline is more developed than the target market. Cambodia has no horizontal RoHS, so there is no standalone Cambodian RoHS conformity step that a Chinese exporter must add — the honest mapping is that the EU 'RoHS' obligation has no direct Cambodian legal counterpart. Existing China RoHS / GB/T 26572 declarations are therefore generally more than sufficient for Cambodian entry and can be retained as voluntary evidence and for buyers who specify substance limits. Exporters should not assume a Cambodian RoHS certificate is required (it is not), but should: (1) check whether any specific CS / IEC product standard for the lamp/luminaire sets substance limits (e.g. mercury in certain lamps); (2) meet any buyer or tender substance specifications, which may reference EU RoHS or REACH voluntarily; (3) recognise the four EU-added phthalates are not a Cambodian requirement.
gap.zh: 这是一种中国基线比目标市场更完善的情形。柬埔寨没有横向 RoHS，故中国出口商无须新增独立的柬埔寨 RoHS 合格评定步骤——据实映射为：欧盟 ＂RoHS＂ 义务在柬埔寨没有直接法律对应。因此现有中国 RoHS / GB/T 26572 声明对柬埔寨入境通常绰绰有余，可作为自愿证据并供设定物质限值的买方使用。出口商不应假设须有柬埔寨 RoHS 证书（实际不需要），但应：（1）核查灯/灯具的特定 CS / IEC 产品标准是否设定物质限值（如某些灯的汞）；（2）满足任何买方或招标物质规范，其可能自愿引用欧盟 RoHS 或 REACH；（3）认识到欧盟新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯并非柬埔寨要求。
gap.zht: 這是一種中國基線比目標市場更完善的情形。柬埔寨沒有橫向 RoHS，故中國出口商無須新增獨立的柬埔寨 RoHS 合格評定步驟——據實映射為：歐盟 ＂RoHS＂ 義務在柬埔寨沒有直接法律對應。因此現有中國 RoHS / GB/T 26572 聲明對柬埔寨入境通常綽綽有餘，可作為自願證據並供設定物質限值的買方使用。出口商不應假設須有柬埔寨 RoHS 證書（實際不需要），但應：（1）核查燈/燈具的特定 CS / IEC 產品標準是否設定物質限值（如某些燈的汞）；（2）滿足任何買方或招標物質規範，其可能自願引用歐盟 RoHS 或 REACH；（3）認識到歐盟新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯並非柬埔寨要求。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable as a horizontal regime — Cambodia has no EU-style RoHS law for EEE; substance limits only where set by a specific CS / IEC product standard or buyer specification
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS applies (GB/T 26572 + RoHS 2 administrative measures); marking and catalogue-based conformity where in scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime for electrical and electronic equipment, so there is no standalone Cambodian RoHS conformity step for LED luminaires. Existing China RoHS / GB/T 26572 substance declarations are generally more than sufficient and can be retained as voluntary evidence. Substance limits apply only where a specific CS / IEC product standard (e.g. mercury limits in certain lamps) or a buyer/tender specification sets them; the four EU-added phthalates are not a Cambodian legal requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨没有针对电气电子设备的欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，故 LED 灯具不存在独立的柬埔寨 RoHS 合格评定步骤。现有中国 RoHS / GB/T 26572 物质声明通常绰绰有余，可作为自愿证据保留。物质限值仅在特定 CS / IEC 产品标准（如某些灯的汞限值）或买方/招标规范设定时适用；欧盟新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯并非柬埔寨法律要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨沒有針對電氣電子設備的歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，故 LED 燈具不存在獨立的柬埔寨 RoHS 合格評定步驟。現有中國 RoHS / GB/T 26572 物質聲明通常綽綽有餘，可作為自願證據保留。物質限值僅在特定 CS / IEC 產品標準（如某些燈的汞限值）或買方/招標規範設定時適用；歐盟新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯並非柬埔寨法律要求。

requirement_topic.en: Mercury & Lamp-Specific Substance Content (CS / IEC lamp standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 汞与灯特定物质含量（CS / IEC 灯标准）
requirement_topic.zht: 汞與燈特定物質含量（CS / IEC 燈標準）

summary.en: Although Cambodia lacks a horizontal RoHS law, certain lamp-specific substance limits can still arise from the product standards ISC adopts (CS / IEC) and from international obligations such as the Minamata Convention on Mercury, to which Cambodia is a party, which phases down mercury-containing products. For LED lamps and luminaires this is largely a non-issue because LED light sources do not contain intentional mercury (unlike fluorescent lamps); however, where a portfolio still includes fluorescent or mixed technologies, the mercury content and phase-out timelines under Minamata and any implementing measures are the relevant constraint rather than an EEE RoHS. For pure-LED products, no mercury restriction step is typically triggered.
summary.zh: 尽管柬埔寨缺乏横向 RoHS 法，特定灯的物质限值仍可能源自 ISC 采用的产品标准（CS / IEC）以及柬埔寨作为缔约方的《关于汞的水俣公约》等国际义务，该公约逐步淘汰含汞产品。对于 LED 灯及灯具，这基本不成问题，因为 LED 光源不含有意添加的汞（不同于荧光灯）；但当产品组合仍包含荧光或混合技术时，相关约束是水俣公约及任何实施措施下的汞含量与淘汰时间表，而非 EEE RoHS。对于纯 LED 产品，通常不触发汞限制步骤。
summary.zht: 儘管柬埔寨缺乏橫向 RoHS 法，特定燈的物質限值仍可能源自 ISC 採用的產品標準（CS / IEC）以及柬埔寨作為締約方的《關於汞的水俁公約》等國際義務，該公約逐步淘汰含汞產品。對於 LED 燈及燈具，這基本不成問題，因為 LED 光源不含有意添加的汞（不同於熒光燈）；但當產品組合仍包含熒光或混合技術時，相關約束是水俁公約及任何實施措施下的汞含量與淘汰時間表，而非 EEE RoHS。對於純 LED 產品，通常不觸發汞限制步驟。

standards_or_laws: Minamata Convention on Mercury — phase-down of mercury-added products (Cambodia is a party); relevant to fluorescent, not pure-LED, light sources
CS / IEC lamp standards — any lamp-specific substance limits adopted by ISC for the product type

summary.en: China is likewise a party to the Minamata Convention and regulates mercury-added products and emissions accordingly; for lamps, mercury content limits historically applied to fluorescent products under GB standards, while LED light sources are mercury-free by design. China RoHS (GB/T 26572) sets the 0.1% mercury concentration limit for EEE homogeneous materials as one of its six restricted substances, which LED products meet inherently. A Chinese exporter therefore generally has documentation showing mercury is not intentionally present in LED products.
summary.zh: 中国同样是《水俣公约》缔约方，并相应管理含汞产品与排放；对于灯，汞含量限值历史上适用于 GB 标准下的荧光产品，而 LED 光源在设计上不含汞。中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）将均质材料 0.1% 汞浓度限值列为其六项受限物质之一，LED 产品固有满足。因此中国出口商通常持有文件证明 LED 产品中不含有意添加的汞。
summary.zht: 中國同樣是《水俁公約》締約方，並相應管理含汞產品與排放；對於燈，汞含量限值歷史上適用於 GB 標準下的熒光產品，而 LED 光源在設計上不含汞。中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）將均質材料 0.1% 汞濃度限值列為其六項受限物質之一，LED 產品固有滿足。因此中國出口商通常持有文件證明 LED 產品中不含有意添加的汞。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — mercury concentration limit (0.1%) among China RoHS restricted substances
Minamata Convention implementation in China — mercury-added product controls

gap.en: For pure-LED products there is effectively no gap: LEDs are mercury-free, Cambodia has no horizontal RoHS, and the Minamata mercury controls bite on fluorescent rather than LED sources. The honest statement is that no Cambodian mercury-restriction step is triggered for LED luminaires. The only situations to watch: (1) a mixed portfolio still shipping fluorescent or CFL products would face Minamata phase-down timelines (verify product mix and any Cambodian implementing schedule); (2) buyer or tender specifications may still request a mercury-free / substance declaration, which the existing China RoHS GB/T 26572 documentation satisfies. No new Cambodian-specific mercury certificate is required for LED.
gap.zh: 对于纯 LED 产品实际上没有差距：LED 不含汞，柬埔寨没有横向 RoHS，水俣公约汞管控针对荧光而非 LED 光源。据实表述为：LED 灯具不触发任何柬埔寨汞限制步骤。仅需关注的情形：（1）仍出货荧光或紧凑型荧光产品的混合组合将面临水俣淘汰时间表（核实产品构成及任何柬埔寨实施时间表）；（2）买方或招标规范仍可能要求无汞/物质声明，现有中国 RoHS GB/T 26572 文件即可满足。LED 无须新的柬埔寨特定汞证书。
gap.zht: 對於純 LED 產品實際上沒有差距：LED 不含汞，柬埔寨沒有橫向 RoHS，水俁公約汞管控針對熒光而非 LED 光源。據實表述為：LED 燈具不觸發任何柬埔寨汞限制步驟。僅需關注的情形：（1）仍出貨熒光或緊湊型熒光產品的混合組合將面臨水俁淘汰時間表（核實產品構成及任何柬埔寨實施時間表）；（2）買方或招標規範仍可能要求無汞/物質聲明，現有中國 RoHS GB/T 26572 文件即可滿足。LED 無須新的柬埔寨特定汞證書。

mandatory_status.target: Not applicable for pure-LED products — no mercury in LED sources; Minamata controls relevant only to fluorescent/CFL technologies; no horizontal EEE RoHS in Cambodia
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS mercury limit met inherently by LED; Minamata controls apply to mercury-added products

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For LED luminaires there is effectively no Cambodian mercury-restriction step: LED sources are mercury-free, Cambodia has no horizontal RoHS, and Minamata mercury controls apply to fluorescent rather than LED technologies. Existing China RoHS / GB/T 26572 documentation already evidences mercury compliance and can satisfy any buyer substance declaration. Only mixed portfolios still shipping fluorescent products need to track Minamata phase-down timelines.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于 LED 灯具实际上不存在柬埔寨汞限制步骤：LED 光源不含汞，柬埔寨没有横向 RoHS，水俣汞管控适用于荧光而非 LED 技术。现有中国 RoHS / GB/T 26572 文件已可证明汞合规，并可满足任何买方物质声明。仅仍出货荧光产品的混合组合需跟踪水俣淘汰时间表。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於 LED 燈具實際上不存在柬埔寨汞限制步驟：LED 光源不含汞，柬埔寨沒有橫向 RoHS，水俁汞管控適用於熒光而非 LED 技術。現有中國 RoHS / GB/T 26572 文件已可證明汞合規，並可滿足任何買方物質聲明。僅仍出貨熒光產品的混合組合需跟蹤水俁淘汰時間表。

requirement_topic.en: Substance Declarations for Buyers & Tenders (voluntary use of China RoHS evidence)
requirement_topic.zh: 面向买方与招标的物质声明（自愿使用中国 RoHS 证据）
requirement_topic.zht: 面向買方與招標的物質聲明（自願使用中國 RoHS 證據）

summary.en: Even without a Cambodian RoHS law, substance declarations frequently matter in practice because public tenders, development-funded projects, large retailers, and export-oriented buyers in Cambodia often specify substance restrictions in their procurement terms, sometimes referencing EU RoHS or REACH SVHC voluntarily. In that case the obligation is contractual, not regulatory: the exporter must meet the buyer's stated substance limits and provide the requested declarations and test reports. ISC import inspection itself does not impose a RoHS list, so the controlling document is the contract/tender specification, which the in-country importer can clarify.
summary.zh: 即便没有柬埔寨 RoHS 法，物质声明在实务中常很重要，因为柬埔寨的公共招标、发展资金资助项目、大型零售商及出口导向买方常在采购条款中规定物质限制，有时自愿引用欧盟 RoHS 或 REACH SVHC。此时义务为合同性而非监管性：出口商须满足买方规定的物质限值，并提供所要求的声明与检测报告。ISC 进口检验本身不施加 RoHS 清单，故控制文件为合同/招标规范，可由在地进口商澄清。
summary.zht: 即便沒有柬埔寨 RoHS 法，物質聲明在實務中常很重要，因為柬埔寨的公共招標、發展資金資助項目、大型零售商及出口導向買方常在採購條款中規定物質限制，有時自願引用歐盟 RoHS 或 REACH SVHC。此時義務為合同性而非監管性：出口商須滿足買方規定的物質限值，並提供所要求的聲明與檢測報告。ISC 進口檢驗本身不施加 RoHS 清單，故控制文件為合同/招標規範，可由在地進口商澄清。

standards_or_laws: Contractual / tender substance specifications (may voluntarily reference EU RoHS 2011/65/EU or REACH SVHC) — not a Cambodian legal mandate
Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) import inspection does not itself impose a RoHS substance list

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers commonly maintain China RoHS (GB/T 26572) hazardous-substance test data, supplier declarations, and—where they also export to the EU—EU RoHS and REACH SVHC documentation. This existing evidence base is directly reusable to answer Cambodian buyer/tender substance specifications. The China RoHS six-substance dataset covers lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB and PBDE; if a Cambodian buyer references EU RoHS, the four phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) would need to be added to the test scope, since China RoHS does not cover them.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常保有中国 RoHS（GB/T 26572）有害物质检测数据、供应商声明，以及（若同时出口欧盟）欧盟 RoHS 与 REACH SVHC 文件。该现有证据库可直接重用以回应柬埔寨买方/招标物质规范。中国 RoHS 六项物质数据集涵盖铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB 及 PBDE；若柬埔寨买方引用欧盟 RoHS，则须将四项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）纳入检测范围，因为中国 RoHS 不涵盖它们。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常保有中國 RoHS（GB/T 26572）有害物質檢測數據、供應商聲明，以及（若同時出口歐盟）歐盟 RoHS 與 REACH SVHC 文件。該現有證據庫可直接重用以回應柬埔寨買方/招標物質規範。中國 RoHS 六項物質數據集涵蓋鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB 及 PBDE；若柬埔寨買方引用歐盟 RoHS，則須將四項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）納入檢測範圍，因為中國 RoHS 不涵蓋它們。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — China RoHS six-substance test data (reusable for buyer declarations)
EU RoHS 2011/65/EU + REACH SVHC documentation where the exporter also serves the EU market

gap.en: The gap here is contractual, not legal: Cambodia imposes no RoHS list, so whether substance declarations are needed depends entirely on the buyer or tender. Practical guidance: (1) confirm with the in-country importer and the specific contract/tender whether substance restrictions are specified and which list (none / China RoHS / EU RoHS / REACH) is referenced; (2) if EU RoHS is referenced, extend testing to include the four phthalates not in China RoHS; (3) reuse existing China RoHS and (if available) EU RoHS/REACH documentation rather than commissioning new tests; (4) do not present a Cambodian RoHS certificate as a regulatory requirement, because none exists — frame substance evidence as voluntary/contractual. This keeps the mapping honest while still meeting real commercial expectations.
gap.zh: 此处差距为合同性而非法律性：柬埔寨不施加 RoHS 清单，故是否需要物质声明完全取决于买方或招标。实务指引：（1）向在地进口商及具体合同/招标确认是否规定物质限制及引用何种清单（无 / 中国 RoHS / 欧盟 RoHS / REACH）；（2）若引用欧盟 RoHS，则扩展检测以纳入中国 RoHS 未含的四项邻苯二甲酸酯；（3）重用现有中国 RoHS 及（如有）欧盟 RoHS/REACH 文件，而非新做检测；（4）不要将柬埔寨 RoHS 证书作为监管要求呈现，因其并不存在——将物质证据定位为自愿/合同性。这样既保持映射据实，又满足真实商业预期。
gap.zht: 此處差距為合同性而非法律性：柬埔寨不施加 RoHS 清單，故是否需要物質聲明完全取決於買方或招標。實務指引：（1）向在地進口商及具體合同/招標確認是否規定物質限制及引用何種清單（無 / 中國 RoHS / 歐盟 RoHS / REACH）；（2）若引用歐盟 RoHS，則擴展檢測以納入中國 RoHS 未含的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯；（3）重用現有中國 RoHS 及（如有）歐盟 RoHS/REACH 文件，而非新做檢測；（4）不要將柬埔寨 RoHS 證書作為監管要求呈現，因其並不存在——將物質證據定位為自願/合同性。這樣既保持映射據實，又滿足真實商業預期。

mandatory_status.target: Contractual only — substance declarations driven by buyer/tender specifications, not Cambodian law; list referenced (if any) determines scope
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS data routinely held; reusable as voluntary evidence; add EU phthalates only if buyer references EU RoHS

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Substance declarations for Cambodia are a contractual matter, not a legal RoHS obligation — ISC import inspection imposes no RoHS list. Where a buyer or tender specifies restrictions, existing China RoHS / GB/T 26572 (and any EU RoHS/REACH) documentation is directly reusable; only if EU RoHS is referenced must the four extra phthalates be added. Exporters should not present a Cambodian RoHS certificate as required, because none exists.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨的物质声明属合同事项，而非法律 RoHS 义务——ISC 进口检验不施加 RoHS 清单。当买方或招标规定限制时，现有中国 RoHS / GB/T 26572（及任何欧盟 RoHS/REACH）文件可直接重用；仅在引用欧盟 RoHS 时才须新增四项邻苯二甲酸酯。出口商不应将柬埔寨 RoHS 证书作为必需呈现，因其并不存在。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨的物質聲明屬合同事項，而非法律 RoHS 義務——ISC 進口檢驗不施加 RoHS 清單。當買方或招標規定限制時，現有中國 RoHS / GB/T 26572（及任何歐盟 RoHS/REACH）文件可直接重用；僅在引用歐盟 RoHS 時才須新增四項鄰苯二甲酸酯。出口商不應將柬埔寨 RoHS 證書作為必需呈現，因其並不存在。
